title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Dhanbad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate:
Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate!
